title: AuguryCraft
description: A Modpack that will take you upon far lands new mobs and new magic.
body: Augurycraft is an extention on the world of mojocraft. Updates upon normal minecraft adding things as well as adding things nmot vinnila like magic, levels of mobs, new pets. Biomes to explore. What path will you take. Will you take it solo or with friends. It will allow you to play minecraft with new exitment.
